description: Periodically hex an area near the Siphoner's target, slowing enemy movement and attack speed.
tooltipTemplate: While in combat, every {cooldownSeconds:1}s the Siphoner automatically hexes enemies within {radius:0} of its current foe. Hexed enemies move at {moveSpeedMultiplier%} speed and attack at {attackSpeedMultiplier%} speed for {durationSeconds:1}s. Costs {manaCost:0} mana per pulse.
